calendar.matters:
Petition To Compel Account And Report; Objections To The Marital Trust'S Accountings Provided By Trustees; Petition To Instruct Trustees To Reimburse
Off Calendar Dec-06-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Newbold for (petitioner) Brian Kelleher and specially appearing for John Hurabiell.

Mr. Newbold reported that the case has settled and that the petition can go off calendar. The Court took the Petition to Compel Account and Report, etc., off calendar.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Yolanda Mazariegos. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

Petition To Compel Account And Report; Objections To The Marital Trust'S Accountings Provided By Trustees; Petition To Instruct Trustees To Reimburse
Off Calendar Nov-22-2016 Continued To Dec-06-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Compel Account And Report; Objections To The Marital Trust'S Accountings Provided By Trustees; Petition To Instruct Trustees To Reimburse
Off Calendar Nov-08-2016 Continued To Nov-22-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Compel Account And Report; Objections To The Marital Trust'S Accountings Provided By Trustees; Petition To Instruct Trustees To Reimburse
Off Calendar Oct-25-2016 Continued To Nov-08-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Hurabiell for the (respondents/trustees) Diane Gutierrez & Carolyn Cunningham. Mr. Hurabiell also specially appeared for petitioner Brian Kelleher.

Mr. Hurabiell reported that they have reached a settlement, that they need a continuance to complete the paperwork, that the issue of the property is resolved and that they hope to file a notice of settlement soon. The Petition to Compel an Account and Report, etc., was continued to November 8, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

Petition To Compel Account And Report; Objections To The Marital Trust'S Accountings Provided By Trustees; Petition To Instruct Trustees To Reimburse
Off Calendar Aug-02-2016 Continued To Oct-25-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Newton for petitioner Brian Kelleher; John Hurabiell for and with Diane Gutierrez and Carolyn Cunningham.

Mr. Newton advised the Court that he believes the IRA issues have now been resolved, and that he is hopeful the accounting issues can be worked out as well. He stated thathe thought an evidentiary hearing would be needed on the real property dispute. Mr. Hurabiell stated that the trustees have acted in good faith, and in fact after an expert's review of the matter were willing to pay more than had been requested. The Court noted that since some issues were being put to rest, the filng of an amended petition was required. Upon the agreement of counsel, the matter was continued to October 25, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court directed the filing of a joint status report by October 18, 2016.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not reported)

Petition To Compel Account And Report; Objections To The Marital Trust'S Accountings Provided By Trustees; Petition To Instruct Trustees To Reimburse
Off Calendar Jul-11-2016 Continued To Aug-02-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
